bugs.description: Discount is subtracted instead of added, giving incorrect totals
bugs.buggyCode: const total = subTotal + taxRate * subTotal - discount;
bugs.fixedCode: const total = subTotal + taxRate * subTotal + discount;
bugs.errorSignature: Calculation error: discount applied with wrong sign
bugs.relatedLogPattern: WARN: Total calculation has incorrect sign for discount
bugs.discoveryHint: Search for common logic errors: inverted conditions, wrong operators
